text_prompt: By default the Gen-4.5 model with exploreMode ON and a 5-second duration will be used.
Image-to-video with a start frame (firstImage → imageAssetId1) and an end frame (lastImage → imageAssetId2). For all parameters see https://useapi.net/docs/api-runwayml-v1/post-runwayml-videos-create
Faster Gen-4 Turbo generation from a single start frame. Other models (veo-3.1, kling-3.0-pro, sora-2, seedance-2, …) are selectable via the model field — see the videos/create docs.
